scripts.build: cp .env apps/web/.env && cd apps/web && npm run build
scripts.dev: cp .env apps/web/.env && cd apps/web && npm run dev
scripts.lint: cp .env apps/web/.env && cd apps/web && npm run lint
scripts.db:generate: cp .env packages/database/.env && cd packages/database && npm run db:generate
scripts.db:push: cp .env packages/database/.env && cd packages/database && npm run db:push
scripts.db:seed: cp .env packages/database/.env && cd packages/database && npm run db:seed
scripts.setup: docker-compose up -d && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
